properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a time for mourning There is a time to grieve There is a time to just let go, a time to leave

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But this is a time for laughter This is a time for cheer You see the tomb is empty Jesus is not here

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Rejoice, He risen, Rejoice He is living Rejoice, He has given, His life so rejoice Rejoice, His blood has cleansed is Rejoice, He has redeemed us and Called as his own So Rejoice

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He took my sin upon Him, He even took my pain Upon the cross, He died His loss has been my gain So let all rejoice in Jesus, Who are made new in Him Let us rejoice in Him, Who freed us from our Sin

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He holds the keys to unlock Death and Hell He holds the keys to His kingdom as well
